title: Othayila Lyrics Endrendrum Punnagai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Othayila
Singer(s): Tippu, Abhay Jodhpurkar, Bhargavi
Movie: Endrendrum Punnagai
Music: Harris Jayaraj
Lyrics: Kabilan

Othayila ulaga marandhu pochu
unna pathi usuru mulukka pechu
nenjai thulaikudhey, uyir valikudhey
nammai naamey nambi vazhndha natpu meendum varuma (2)

Arattaigal adithomey, kuratayil sirithomey
paratayaayai thirindhomey
ippodhu padhiyil pirindhomey

iravinil nizhalaaga
iruvarai ilandheney
mazhayinil azhudhaaley kanneerai
yaar dhai arivaaro

aval thozhaivinnil thodarkadhayo
ivan vihigalil vidukadhayo
inimel naaney thaniyaai aanen
natpu enna naipo

Namakkena irundhomey
dhinasari pirandhomey
dhisaigalaai pirindhomey
kalaada kaatinil thozhaindhomey

panithuzhi malarodu
palakkangal silarodu
natpuku mudivedhu
endre nee sonnadhu marakaadhu ..

Naanum marakiren mudiyalaye
kanneer vadikiren karaiyillaye
irundhen unnaal
irupen unnaal
natpu serkkum orunaal

Othayila ulaga marandhu pochu
unna pathi usuru mulukka pechu
nenjai thulaikudhey, uyir valikudhey
nammai naamey nambi vazhndha natpu meendum varuma

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Othayila'?

The song 'Othayila' conveys deep emotions of love and nostalgia, reflecting on cherished memories and relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Endrendrum Punnagai'?

Endrendrum Punnagai revolves around themes of love, friendship, and the complexities of relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Othayila'?

The song features the talented voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Tipu, with music composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Othayila' released?

'Othayila' was released on October 25, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Endrendrum Punnagai, the song Othayila serves as a heartfelt expression of love and reminiscence. It beautifully encapsulates the emotions of longing and connection, making it a pivotal moment in the film. The harmonious blend of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Tipu's voices, along with Harrish Jeyaraj's melodic composition, evokes a sense of nostalgia. This song resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and sorrows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Othayila from the movie Endrendrum Punnagai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Tipu, paired with Harrish Jeyaraj's captivating music, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with every romantic soul.
stanzaMeanings: The world has forgotten you, and my heart is filled with sorrow thinking about you. Life is precious, and the friendship we had, can it come back again?
We have faced challenges together, laughed in tough times, and now we are separated on this path.
In the shadow of my heart, I have lost both of us. When it rains, who knows the tears that fall?
In her friendship, is there a continuation? In his skies, is there a departure? From now on, I have become alone; where has our friendship gone?
We have been together, born on the same day, separated by directions, and we have lost ourselves in the light of the day.
With the fragrant flower, some friendships have ended; what you said about it should not be forgotten.
I too forget, unable to hold back my tears. I have been without a shore, but because of you, I will stand; one day our friendship will unite again.
